headline: Cognizant (CTSH) Launches Neuro AI Trust Platform for AI Governance
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy according to analysts. On July 1, Cognizant announced the launch of Cognizant Neuro AI Trust, a new platform designed to provide enterprises with continuous governance and real-time assurance for complex AI systems. As organizations shift toward autonomous AI environments, this […]
